activate_when: The user asks to identify, list, track, validate, invalidate, or review assumptions.
The user asks for an assumption register, assumption log, risk assumptions, hypothesis tracker, or evidence gaps.
The task requires separating verified facts from unvalidated assumptions before planning or delivery.
do_not_activate_when: The request is only about grammar, weather, generic summaries, certificates, or unrelated logging.
The user asks for implementation without needing assumption tracking.
The input has no assumption, hypothesis, uncertainty, decision, risk, or evidence-gap context.
clarification_required_when: The user asks to validate assumptions but provides no evidence source.
The request could mean activity logging instead of assumption logging.
